ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "package_url" TEXT /* URL where the package is hosted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the package (e.g., libraries, frameworks) */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* Maintainer of the package */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the package has */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks the package has */,
  "issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues the package has */,
  "pull_requests" INTEGER /* Number of open pull requests the package has */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit to the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "release_notes_url" TEXT /* URL of the release notes */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for this version */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the latest version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the artifact belongs to */,
  "artifact_name" TEXT /* Name of the artifact */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the artifact */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the artifact in MB */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the artifact for integrity verification */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL where the artifact can be downloaded */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for this artifact */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the artifact is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the artifact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the artifact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artifacts_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL where the license is hosted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "spdx_id" TEXT /* SPDX ID of the license for standardization */,
  "is_osi_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the license is OSI-approved */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted by the license */,
  "limitations" TEXT /* Limitations imposed by the license */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the license */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the license was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the license was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "package_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package version relationship */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version is stable */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version is deprecated */,
  "deprecation_message" TEXT /* Message explaining the deprecation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_licenses" (
  "package_license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package license relationship */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the primary license for the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_licenses_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_licenses_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the package */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the package */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access was successful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "child_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child package */,
  "version_constraint" TEXT /* Version constraint for the dependency */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dependency is optional */,
  "is_dev_dependency" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dependency is a development dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_child_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., technical, administrative) */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the metadata is private */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_metadata_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
